function.name: make_decision
function.arguments: {"chosen_move": "commit", "action_id": "suppress", "prior_adjustment_log_odds": -1.5, "adjustment_reasons": ["Guard radioed in 'all clear' - direct human confirmation", "Evidence level already E0 (nothing to act on)", "Board load at 20/10min - flood conditions, policy R-004 triggers suppression"], "novelty_flag": true, "confidence_p_real": 0.12, "what_would_change_my_mind": "A second guard reporting something anomalous in the same zone, or a different sensor type triggering at the same zone with conflicting data."}
